nameMeanings.name: Niels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names В© Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from the personal name Neel, a shortened form of either Cornelius or Daneel (see Daniel ).
English (Devon): variant of Neal , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cornelius
meanings: Dutch, German, Danish, and southern English: from the Latin personal name Cornelius (originally an old Roman surname, probably derived from cornu вҖҳhornвҖҷ), borne by a 3rd-century pope and Christian saint. In England, this name is rarely found before the 16th century, when the name was brought to England from the Low Countries by Protestants, among whom it was also a popular name in the vernacular form Cornelis. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the German or Dutch variant Kornelius.

variants.name: Neals
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch and North German   Neels  .
English: variant of Neal , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names В© Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (мҳӨ; Chinese character: еҗі): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late KoryЕҸ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O ChвҖҷЕҸm (еҗі зһ»), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King ChijЕӯng (500вҖ“514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Denmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names В© Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

variants.name: Dence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench вҖҳDanishвҖҷ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: Niels of Denmark was born in 1063, in Ribe, Denmark. He married Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden in 1105. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 June 1134, in Schleswig, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, at the age of 71.

de.lifeSummary: Niels of Denmark wurde 1063 in Ribe, DГӨnemark geboren. Er hat 1105 Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 SГ¶hne und 2 TГ¶chter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1134 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland.

pt.lifeSummary: Niels of Denmark nasceu em 1063, em Ribe, Dinamarca. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden em 1105. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1134, em Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Niels of Denmark СҖРҫРҙРёР»СҒСҸ РІ 1063 Рі. РІ РјРөСҒСӮРҪРҫСҒСӮРё СҖРёРұ, Р”Р°РҪРёСҸ. РһРҪ Р¶РөРҪРёР»СҒСҸ РҪР° Р¶РөРҪСүРёРҪРө РҝРҫ РёРјРөРҪРё Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden РІ 1105 Рі. РЈ РҪРёС… РұСӢР»Рҫ РҝРҫ РәСҖР°Р№РҪРөР№ РјРөСҖРө 2 СҒСӢРҪР° Рё 2 РҙРҫСҮРөСҖРё. РһРҪ СғРјРөСҖ 25 РёСҺРҪСҸ 1134 Рі. РІ РјРөСҒСӮРҪРҫСҒСӮРё СүР»РөСҒРІРёРі, РәСҖРёСҒ СүР»РөСҒРІРёРі, СүР»РөСҒРІРёРі-С…РҫР»СҒСӮРёРҪ, Р“РөСҖРјР°РҪРёСҸ РІ РІРҫР·СҖР°СҒСӮРө 71 РіРҫРҙ.

es.lifeSummary: Niels of Denmark naciГі en 1063, en Ribe, Dinamarca. Se casГі con Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden en 1105. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. MuriГі el 25 de junio de 1134, en Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, a la edad de 71 aГұos.
